top_signals.title: China Rushes to Buy East Russian Oil as Middle East Risks Grow
top_signals.summary: Chinese buyers are snapping up Russia’s flagship ESPO crude weeks earlier than usual, as heightened risks to Middle East oil flows prompt refiners to secure supplies before they’re needed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK Pub Stocks Fall as Heat Wave Proves Too Hot For Football Fans
top_signals.summary: UK pub stocks slumped this week as a sales boost from the World Cup failed to offset the drag from a brutal heat wave and higher costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
